popup.loading.title: Loading…
popup.loading.body: One moment — picking up the latest status.
popup.idle.label: No target yet
popup.monitoring.lookAgain: No slots. I'll look again in {time}.
popup.slotFound.evidenceLabel: Why I think there's a slot
popup.loggedOut.title: Session expired
popup.loggedOut.body: Your TLScontact session expired — {emph}. Sign back in and I'll pick up where I left off.
popup.loggedOut.bodyEmph: I can't watch a logged-out page
popup.loggedOut.note: Monitoring paused until I see a fresh session.
popup.cloudflare.title: Security check needed
popup.cloudflare.body: Cloudflare is asking you to prove you're human. That's normal — {emph}, then I'll resume polling.
popup.cloudflare.whyNot: Why I'm not solving it for you
popup.cloudflare.whyNotBody: Auto-solving CAPTCHAs is the fastest way to get an account banned. I won't do it. You always solve, I always wait.
popup.paused.title: Paused
popup.paused.label: Status
popup.paused.sub: Nothing is being checked. Last status: no slots, {time}.
popup.unknown.title: Help me read this page
popup.unknown.body: The page changed shape. {emph} and tell me what you see — I'll learn and stop asking.
popup.unknown.submit: Submit hash to help improve detection
welcome.h1.after: page so you don't have to.
welcome.lede: I'm a small, polite background process. I refresh your appointment booking page on a steady cadence and tap you on the shoulder the moment a slot appears — nothing more.
welcome.yes.1: Refresh your TLScontact booking page on a polite cadence — every 2–15 minutes, defaulting to four.
welcome.yes.2: Notify you the instant a slot opens, via desktop alert and an optional chime.
welcome.yes.3: Run entirely inside your browser. Your session never leaves this computer.
welcome.yes.4: Show my work — every detection comes with the evidence I used.
welcome.no.1: Read your passport number, name, or any form field on the page.
welcome.no.2: Book the slot for you. You always do the booking yourself.
welcome.no.3: Solve Cloudflare captchas. I'll politely ask you to.
welcome.no.4: Share your data with anyone. There is no server. There is no telemetry by default.
welcome.disclaim: TLScontact's terms of service may classify automation as prohibited. I keep polling polite to minimise risk, but you use this at your own risk. I'm open source — verify what I do at
settings.title: Settings
settings.target.none: No target detected — open a TLScontact page in any tab.
settings.notif.title: Change tab title and favicon
settings.notif.focus: Auto-focus the TLS tab on detection
settings.oc.encrypt: Encrypt OpenClaw token with a passphrase
settings.lang.note: Detection language must match TLScontact account setting.
settings.privacy.telemetrySub: Sent: poll counts, error counts. Never: URLs, PII.

wizard.step1.hint: Most local setups use the default. For remote, use wss://your-gateway.example.com/openclaw
wizard.step1.invalid: Must be a ws:// or wss:// URL.
